input_context.task_name: macOS Accessibility CGO Bindings - Complete Implementation

missing_functions.accessibility.m: Implement above functions using AXUIElement API

input_context.instructions: USE file_write TOOL CALLS. Add missing functions to existing files. Key APIs: AXUIElementCreateApplication(pid), AXUIElementCopyAttributeValue with "AXWindows", "AXFocusedWindow", "AXValue". See spec docs/tasks/2.5-spec.md for details.

output_preview:
## Why L0 Failed

**Root Cause:** Knowledge gap - L0 lacked understanding of macOS Accessibility APIs (AXUIElementCreateApplication, attribute copying, CFRelease), Objective-C integration with CGO (NSWorkspace for app enumeration, bundle ID filtering for Terminal/iTerm2), string packing into null-separated C buffers, and unsafe.Pointer-based parsing in Go CGO. Attempts likely had leaks, nil derefs, wrong attributes (e.g., AXValue on wrong elements), or build failures due to missing frameworks.
